title: 10 Things Your Phone Is Quietly Stealing
caption:
You won't notice it until it's gone.

Your first thought of the day. Your silence. Eye contact. The full depth of boredom. The memory of the moment you were too busy filming.

Your prayer life. Your sleep. Your attention span. Real friendship. The man you were supposed to become.

This generation's war isn't with the world out there — it's with the device in your pocket. If you can't put it down, something other than Christ owns you.

This is a war. Not a detox.

Save this. Then put the phone down.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phonefree #christianity #selfcontrol
